title: 熱中☆ハプニングサマー 2話 夏になんか負けない

script.text: ――半月後

translations.en: ――2 weeks after

script.text: 今日は猛暑日か……どうりで、暑いはずだよ

translations.en: It's scorching hot today…it's so hot.

script.text: あっ、こころ！　こっち！

translations.en: Ah‚ Kokoro! Over here!

script.text: 今日も暑いね～、愛

translations.en: It's so hot again‚ Ai.

script.text: こころのせっかくの美肌が焼けちゃうよ……

translations.en: Kokoro's beautiful skin will get tanned…

script.text: 自分で言わない。後、ぐでっとしないの

translations.en: Don't say that to yourself. Also‚ don't slouch.

script.text: 先輩達は今も頑張って新曲の企画を練ってるんだから

translations.en: Senpais are still working hard on planning the new song.

script.text: 後輩の私達がダラけてる訳にはいかないでしょ？

translations.en: We can't slack off as juniors‚ right?

script.text: 分かってるよ～。だから、こうしてアイスを持って

translations.en: I know that. That's why I brought ice cream.

script.text: 陣中見舞いに行くんじゃない……

translations.en: We're here to give our support…

script.text: それにしても、莉央さんも葵さんも凄いよね

translations.en: By the way‚ Rio-san and Aoi-san are amazing.

script.text: オフも自主練して企画を立てて、ストイックっていうか

translations.en: They even practice on their days off and plan everything themselves. It's so dedicated.

script.text: ストイック過ぎ！　こころは夏休みくらい

translations.en: Too dedicated! I wanted to go out with the four of us during summer vacation.

script.text: 四人で遊びに行きたかったのに～

translations.en: But here I am…

script.text: え？　こころも？

translations.en: Eh? You too‚ Kokoro?

script.text: 当然だよ～。海水浴やキャンプに花火……

translations.en: Of course! I wanted the four of us to enjoy summer together—

script.text: 夏を四人で満喫したかったのに～

translations.en: going to the beach‚ camping‚ fireworks…

script.text: 四人で曲作りの名目で遊びに行くつもりが

translations.en: I planned to use songwriting as an excuse to hang out.

script.text: まさか莉央さんと葵さんが引きこもっちゃうなんて

translations.en: Never expected Rio-san and Aoi-san to turn into homebodies.

script.text: こころがそういう方向に持って行ったんだからね

translations.en: Well‚ you were the one who brought it up in that direction…

script.text: ……実は私も、四人で遊びたかったんだけど

translations.en: …Actually‚ I also wanted to hang out with the four of us.

script.text: でも今更、外に遊びに行こうなんて絶対言えないよ

translations.en: But now‚ I can't possibly say‚ "Let's go out together!"

script.text: そんな空気じゃないもん！

translations.en: It's just not the right atmosphere!

script.text: だよね～。二人とも融通が利かないのが玉にキズだよ

translations.en: Yeah‚ both of them not budging is a bummer.

script.text: こころを見習ってほしいよ～

translations.en: They should learn from Kokoro.

script.text: なんとかして、一緒に遊びに行けないかな～

translations.en: I wish we could find a way to go out together.

script.text: あ、寝込みを襲って拉致しちゃう？

translations.en: Oh‚ how about we ambush them in their sleep and kidnap them?

script.text: 怖いよ！　こころ、何言ってるの！

translations.en: Scary! Kokoro‚ what are you saying!

script.text: 半分冗談だよ～～

translations.en: Half-joking‚ you know~

script.text: 半分は本気だけど

translations.en: But half-serious.

script.text: 半分でもダメだよ……もう

translations.en: Half is still a no… Enough!

script.text: 失礼しまーす。先輩方

translations.en: Excuse me‚ senpais.

script.text: 企画の進み具合はどうですか～～？

translations.en: How's the progress of the plan?

script.text: アイス買って来ましたので一休み――って

translations.en: I brought ice cream for a break—wait.

script.text: 部屋の中あっつ！

translations.en: It's sweltering in here!

script.text: ……な、夏ってなんなのよ…………

translations.en: …What's with this summer…

script.text: 夏は……夏なんだ、多分、きっと……

translations.en: It's summer… it's just summer‚ probably‚ I guess…

script.text: きゃーっ！　せ、先輩方が倒れて……！？

translations.en: Kyaa! S-Senpais collapsed…!?

script.text: まさか、し、し、死んで……！？

translations.en: Don't tell me they're d-d-dead…!?

script.text: じ、事件！　事件発生だよ！　一体、誰が先輩達を……

translations.en: I-Incident! We have an incident here! Who could have done this to our senpais…

script.text: 待って、勝手に被害者に触っちゃダメ！

translations.en: Wait‚ don't touch the victims on your own!

script.text: 鑑識さんが来るまでそっとしとかないと……

translations.en: We should leave them be until the forensics team arrives…

script.text: ……事件でもないし、被害者でもないわ

translations.en: …It's not an incident‚ and we're not victims.

script.text: 暑さでまいってただけだよ……

translations.en: We just got overwhelmed by the heat…

script.text: 企画に煮詰まっちゃってね…

translations.en: We were stuck on the plan…

script.text: とにかく、お水持ってきますから！

translations.en: Anyway‚ I'll go get some water!

script.text: 熱中症になったら大変ですよ

translations.en: It'd be a problem if you got heatstroke.

script.text: アイスもありますよ～

translations.en: We also have ice cream~

script.text: ……あ、溶けちゃってる

translations.en: …Ah‚ it's already melting.

script.text: はい、お水どうぞ

translations.en: Here‚ please have some water.

script.text: どうして冷房をつけなかったんですか？

translations.en: Why didn't you turn on the air conditioning?

script.text: 決まってるじゃない

translations.en: It's obvious‚ isn't it?

script.text: 暑ければ、夏を体感出来るでしょう？

translations.en: If it's hot‚ we can experience summer‚ right?

script.text: えぇ～……こんなむわっとした部屋じゃ

translations.en: Ugh… How can you be

script.text: 曲作りなんて出来ないんじゃないですか～？

translations.en: productive in this stuffy room?

script.text: ――夏に、負けたくなかったのよ

translations.en: ――I don't want to lose to the summer.

script.text: いやいや。ここはカッコつけるところじゃないです～

translations.en: This is not the time to act cool.

script.text: う～ん……これは相当煮詰まってますね

translations.en: Well… this is really getting nowhere.

script.text: ……ふぅ、水とアイスのおかげで生き返ったよ

translations.en: …Phew‚ thanks to the water and ice‚ I'm feeling better.

script.text: ありがとう、二人とも

translations.en: Thanks‚ both of you.

script.text: こんなことしか出来なくて、すみません

translations.en: I'm sorry‚ this is all I can do.

script.text: アイス溶けちゃってましたし

translations.en: And the ice cream melted too…

script.text: そんな風に言わないでよ

translations.en: Don't say that.

script.text: 愛の気遣いには、いつも助けられてるんだから

translations.en: Your consideration always helps us.

script.text: 僕と莉央は仕事以外はテキトーだから、余計に感心する

translations.en: Rio and I are usually laid-back when it's not about work‚ so I'm even more impressed.

script.text: ちょっと、私を一緒にしないでちょうだい

translations.en: Please don't lump me together with them.

script.text: 今までだって、ご飯作ったりしてあげたでしょ？

translations.en: I used to make food for you‚ didn't I?

script.text: でも、寮にこもり出してからは

translations.en: But ever since you started staying in your room all the time…

script.text: ロクなもの食べてなかったんじゃない？

translations.en: You've barely eaten anything decent‚ right?

script.text: ……最後に食事したの、いつだったかしら？

translations.en: …When was the last time I had a meal‚ I wonder?

script.text: トーストをかじったよね……

translations.en: You just nibbled on toast…

script.text: ええと、昨日だったっけ……

translations.en: Hmm‚ was it yesterday?

script.text: こんな環境でそんなことしてたら

translations.en: If you keep doing that in this environment…

script.text: 体壊しちゃいますよ！

translations.en: Your health will suffer.

script.text: 莉央は何かに夢中になると

translations.en: When Rio gets absorbed in something‚

script.text: 他が全部おろそかになるんだ

translations.en: she neglects everything else.

script.text: 今回は「こころに初めての挫折を味わわせるわ」

translations.en: This time‚ she was determined to make

script.text: って張り切ってたから

translations.en: Kokoro experience her first setback.

script.text: 莉央さん、大人げないですぅ

translations.en: Rio-san‚ it's not very grown-up of you.

script.text: そして葵さん急にモノマネ入れてこないで下さい

translations.en: And Aoi-san‚ please don't suddenly start imitating people.

script.text: 莉央さん、そんなにムキにならなくても……

translations.en: Rio-san‚ you don't need to be so obsessed…

script.text: 第一、こころは今まで何度も挫折を味わってますから

translations.en: Besides‚ Kokoro has experienced setbacks many times before.

script.text: ですです。こころは練習生の頃、オーディションに

translations.en: Exactly! Kokoro lost auditions countless times as a trainee

script.text: それはもう落ちまくり――って、何言わせるんですか

translations.en: —Wait‚ why are you making me say this?

script.text: こころは負けてません～

translations.en: Kokoro hasn't lost—

script.text: 勝ちの途中というヤツですぅ

translations.en: she's still in the process of winning!

script.text: はいはい、貴方も負けず嫌いなのね

translations.en: Yes‚ yes. You're also fiercely competitive‚ aren't you?

script.text: 私と同じね

translations.en: Just like me.

script.text: 貴方達の先輩として、中途半端な企画は出せないから

translations.en: As your senpais‚ we can't present a half-baked plan.

script.text: つい根を詰め過ぎちゃったのよ……

translations.en: I got too caught up in it… that's all.

script.text: あのー、それでどの程度、企画は出来たんですか？

translations.en: Uhm‚ so how much progress did the plan make?

script.text: ……どうして目をそらすんですか～？

translations.en: …Why are you avoiding eye contact?

script.text: こころの透き通った瞳をまっすぐ見て下さい

translations.en: Look straight into Kokoro's clear eyes.

script.text: 見れない理由でもあるんですか～？

translations.en: Is there a reason you can't do that?

script.text: つまり、あんまり進んでいないと……

translations.en: In other words‚ it hasn't progressed much…

script.text: どうしてかしら？　今回は何も閃かないのよ

translations.en: I wonder why… This time‚ I can't come up with any ideas.

script.text: そうだね、こんなに煮詰まったのは初めてだよ

translations.en: Yeah‚ this is the first time we've been so stuck.

script.text: 何が足りないんだろう……

translations.en: What could be missing…

script.text: ……はぁっ！？　これはっ！　何か降りてきましたっ！

translations.en: …Ah! This is it! It's coming down!

script.text: ふむふむ……そうだったんですね……夏の神サマー……

translations.en: Hmmm… So that's how it is… the summer divine inspiration…

script.text: 大丈夫？　まさかこころまで

translations.en: Are you okay? Did you‚ by any chance‚

script.text: 頭が暑さでやられちゃったの？

translations.en: get heatstroke in your head?

script.text: ぜんっぜん違います！

translations.en: No way! This is different!

script.text: こころは分かったのです、先輩方に何が足りないのか

translations.en: Kokoro has figured it out—what's missing for our senpais.

script.text: ……葵と私に何が足りないって言うの？

translations.en: …You're saying there's something missing from Aoi and me?

script.text: そ～れ～は～、こころと愛ちゃんに

translations.en: Yeeees~ If you leave it to Kokoro and Ai-chan‚

script.text: 任せてくれれば教えて差し上げますよ～

translations.en: I'll gladly let you know~!

script.text: え？　わ、私も……？

translations.en: Eh? M-Me too…?
